note: Seed topic→table labelled set for the WP16 table finder (sub-part 1). Every expected tableId MUST exist in tests/fixtures/cbs/_catalog.json, the hermetic catalog the eval's recall runs over, so record→replay stays consistent. Several cases have a Regulier answer that ranks BELOW discontinued keyword-matches in raw recall — they test the rerank's 'prefer current tables' rule. This is a starter set; expand it during live calibration of DEFAULT_FIND_TABLE_CONFIG.highConfidence.
